svg.title: Tokki deployment flow
svg.desc: A deployment diagram showing Tokki installers using a private wheelhouse, installing the local CLI, optionally adding agent wrappers, and running strict doctor checks while source and raw payloads stay private.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: Private wheels install the local CLI.
